allow: Bash(node -e "const Z = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); console.log\('z keys:', Object.keys\(Z.z\).filter\(k=>['string','email','url','uuid','enum','object'].includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\('z.string keys after trim/toLowerCase:', Object.keys\(Z.z.string\(\).trim\(\).toLowerCase\(\)\).filter\(k=>['email','url','uuid','min','max'].includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\('z.string\(\).email exists?', typeof Z.z.string\(\).email\);")
